overview: MedFIT provides medical weight loss and testosterone replacement therapy through personalized treatment plans developed by a comprehensive care team. Services include GLP-1 medications, testosterone therapy, and wellness support with progress monitoring through FIT3D body composition tracking.
highlights: Free lab work and FIT3D body scan at first visit
Comprehensive care team (physicians, nurses, nutritionists, health coaches)
Multiple testosterone treatment options (injections, gels, creams, patches, pellets, nasal sprays)
targetAudience: Individuals experiencing low testosterone symptoms and those seeking medically supervised weight loss and hormonal optimization.
